use serde::Deserialize;

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct AppConfig {
    name: String,
    port: u16,
    debug: bool,
    log_level: String,
    max_connections: usize,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct DatabaseConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    pool_size: u32,
}

fn load_config(path: &str) -> Result<AppConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: AppConfig = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}

fn load_db_config(path: &str) -> Result<DatabaseConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: DatabaseConfig = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}
